# HIPAA Privacy Rule

Jurisdiction: United States - Federal
Region: US-FED
Citation: 45 CFR Parts 160 and 164
Authority: HHS OCR / eCFR
Source URL: https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-45/subtitle-A/subchapter-C
Topics: sensitive_data, notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, processor_contracts, security_breach, data_minimization
Keywords: HIPAA, protected health information, PHI, covered entity, business associate

## Summary
US health privacy framework for covered entities and business associates handling protected health information.

## Key compliance obligations
- Use or disclose PHI only as permitted or authorised.
- Provide notice of privacy practices and individual rights.
- Use business-associate agreements and safeguards.
